name: Debopama Basu
bio: I'm Debopama, an M.Tech student in System-on-Chip Design at IIT Palakkad, currently researching hardware security and post-quantum cryptography at IIT Kharagpur's SEAL Lab under Prof. Debdeep Mukhopadhyay. Before academia, I spent two years as a software engineer at Cognizant, working on application security for a fintech firm. I'm drawn to the intersection of hardware and security, understanding how systems can be broken so they can be built better. When I'm not staring at power traces or Verilog code, I'm probably singing.

experience.description: Led a team of 5 engineers to rebuild the core product, improving performance by 40% and user satisfaction scores significantly.
Built features from zero to one, shipped multiple products, and worked closely with design and product teams.

projects.title: Project Alpha
projects.description: A SaaS platform that helps teams manage their workflows more efficiently. Built with React and Node.js.

projects.title: Project Beta
projects.description: An open-source design system used by 500+ developers. Fully accessible and customizable.

projects.title: Project Gamma
projects.description: A mobile-first web app for tracking personal goals with beautiful data visualizations.
